description_long: This bungalow features a modern, open-plan interior with large floor-to-ceiling windows along one side, allowing ample natural light to flood the living space. The main living area is furnished with a white sectional sofa, a dining table with green chairs, and several potted plants, creating a fresh and inviting atmosphere. Vertical green walls and built-in shelving add a touch of nature and functionality to the space. The color palette is dominated by white and green, with accents of gray and natural wood tones. The exterior is characterized by clean, straight lines and a flat roof, giving it a contemporary architectural style. The overall design emphasizes openness, greenery, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, green accents, and an open, plant-filled interior.
description_view_0: Side view showing the extensive glass window wall and glimpses of the green interior decor.
description_view_1: Front-facing view revealing the main entrance, green feature wall, dining area, and vertical plant installations.
description_view_2: Angled interior view highlighting the open-plan layout, white sectional sofa, dining table, and abundant greenery.
description_view_3: Rear view with mostly solid white wall and partial visibility of the green roof and plant features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped side windows
